tasks.title: Add --dry-run flag to af wt cleanup
tasks.description: Users want to preview what would be deleted before committing. Add a --dry-run flag that lists candidates without deleting.

items.text: Add --dry-run flag to cleanup command args
Print candidate list without deleting when flag is set
Update help text

acceptance: af wt cleanup --dry-run lists worktrees that would be deleted
No worktrees are actually removed when --dry-run is set

tasks.title: CDT code validation in scrubbing engine
tasks.description: Validate CDT codes against the internal ADA code table before claim submission. Check code exists and is valid for the date of service.

items.text: Load CDT code table into memory on startup
Validate code exists in table
Validate code is active for date of service
Return structured validation errors

acceptance: Invalid CDT codes are rejected with a clear error message
Expired codes are rejected when DOS is after expiration
Valid codes pass without error

tasks.title: Canonical payer lookup by PMS name
tasks.description: Given a free-text payer name from the PMS, fuzzy-match to a canonical payer. Used during claim assembly to resolve the correct Stedi payer ID.

items.text: Build fuzzy matching function (Levenshtein + normalized)
Add alias table for known PMS payer name variants
Return match confidence score
Flag low-confidence matches for human review

acceptance: Exact matches return 100% confidence
Common variants (e.g., 'Delta Dental CA' vs 'Delta Dental of California') match correctly
Completely unknown payer names are flagged, not silently dropped

tasks.title: RPA health score dashboard widget
tasks.description: Display per-payer RPA bot health scores in the web app. Show 7-day rolling success rate, last failure timestamp, and auto-failover status.

items.text: Add health score calculation (successes / attempts over 7 days)
Create API endpoint for per-payer health data
Build dashboard card component

acceptance: Health score updates in real-time as submissions complete
Payers below 95% threshold are visually flagged
Clicking a payer shows recent submission history

tasks.title: Open Dental procedure data extraction
tasks.description: Query Open Dental's procedurelog table to pull completed procedures for claim assembly. Map to our internal data model.

items.text: Query procedurelog joined with procedurecode for CDT codes
Extract tooth number, surfaces, and fees per procedure
Detect new completed procedures since last poll
Map to internal claim service line model
Handle edge cases: deleted procedures, amended procedures

acceptance: Completed procedures appear in our system within one polling cycle
CDT codes, tooth numbers, and surfaces are correctly mapped
Amended procedures update existing records, not create duplicates

tasks.title: Tooth-surface validation rules
tasks.description: Tier 2 scrubbing: validate that tooth numbers and surface codes are appropriate for the CDT procedure category.

items.text: Restorative codes require tooth + surfaces
Endo codes require tooth, no surfaces
Crown codes require tooth, no surfaces
Perio quadrant codes require oral cavity designation
Validate O for posterior, I for anterior

acceptance: A D2391 without surfaces is rejected
A D3310 with surfaces is rejected
A D4341 without quadrant designation is rejected
Correct combinations pass validation

tasks.title: Rendering provider NPI collection
tasks.description: Add individual dentist NPI, taxonomy code, and license number to the onboarding flow. Each practice needs a provider roster.

items.text: Add provider roster data model (NPI type 1, taxonomy, license)
Add provider management UI to onboarding
Validate NPI against NPPES registry

acceptance: Each practice can have multiple rendering providers
NPI validation catches invalid numbers before save
Provider taxonomy code defaults to 1223G0001X (general dentistry)

tasks.title: 837D generation via Stedi
tasks.description: Generate a valid 837D X12 transaction from our internal claim data model using Stedi's JSON-to-X12 API.

items.text: Map internal claim model to Stedi 837D JSON schema
Include SV3, TOO, DN1/DN2 segments where applicable
Handle PWK segment for attachment references
Submit via Stedi API and capture response
Parse 999/277CA acknowledgments

acceptance: Generated 837D passes Stedi validation
All required segments are present for dental claims
Submission failures return structured error data
